title: rhus copallinum subsp. leucantha
intro: Rhus copallinum subsp. leucantha is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Anacardiaceae, commonly known as the silver smoke tree or silver smoke. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rhus copallinum subsp. leucantha include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves for topical use, and its bark and roots can be used to make medicinal extracts.
